title: The Tell: 8 tech stocks poised to bounce after Nasdaq plunge, according to AI platform
text: Nvidia Corp. tops a list of technology stocks that would be expected to bounce back strongly over the next month based on the reaction to past plunges by the Nasdaq Composite, according to an artificial-intelligence-driven screening platform.

title: Synopsys CFO Trac Pham to Speak at Needham Virtual Growth Conference
text: MOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif., Jan. 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Synopsys, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNPS) today announced that Trac Pham, CFO, will present at the 24th Annual Needham Growth Conference on January 12, 2022.
